base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of continue_portraits_sst2 — a ui (menu_screen) from 1991 street fighter ii. Super Turbo continue-screen portraits (post-KO crying faces). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
